<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:事代主神社 (阿波市)]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|事代主神社 (阿波市)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)
| native_name = 事代主神社
| image = Kotoshironushi Shrine, Awa City.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.08997194444444|134.3293611111111}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Kotoshironushi Shrine'''|事代主神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}}
** Series ordinal: 2635
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183180</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183180</ref>
** Series ordinal: 2639

* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514}}
** Series ordinal: 6
** P155: {{ill|Takefutsuno Shrine|lt=Takefutsuno Shrine|qid=Q135041304}}
** P156: {{ill|Kamono Shrine|lt=Kamono Shrine|qid=Q135041305}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Awa, Tokushima|lt=Awa|ar|أوا (توكوشيما)|azb|آوا، توکوشیما|ca|Awa (ciutat)|ceb|Awa-shi|ce|Ава (гӀала, Япон)|de|Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa, Tokushima|envoyage|Awa|es|Awa (Tokushima)|et|Awa|fa|آوا، توکوشیما|fi|Awa (Tokushima)|fr|Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Awa|hy|Ավա (քաղաք, Ճապոնիա)|id|Awa, Tokushima|it|Awa (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|ko|아와시|mzn|آوا، توکوشیما|nl|Awa (stad)|pl|Awa (miasto)|pt|Awa (Tokushima)|ro|Awa|ru|Ава (город, Япония)|sv|Awa, Tokushima|tg|Ауа|tl|Awa, Tokushima|tr|Awa (şehir)|tt|Ава (шәһәр, Япония)|uk|Ава (Токусіма)|vi|Awa, Tokushima|war|Awa, Tokushima|zh-classical|阿波市|zh_min_nan|Awa-chhī|zh_yue|阿波|zh|阿波市|zhvoyage|阿波|qid=Q791587}}
* {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457}}
* {{ill|Awa District, Tokushima|lt=Awa district|en|Awa District, Tokushima|ja|阿波郡|ko|아와군 (도쿠시마현)|zh|阿波郡|qid=Q4829634}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.08997194444444|134.3293611111111}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183180</ref>

== image (P18) ==

* Kotoshironushi Shrine, Awa City.jpg

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 183180
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 5480005003210

==References==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]
[[JA:事代主神社 (阿波市)]]

{{wikidata link|Q48758503}}
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|事代主神社 (阿波市)|version=102294823|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{脚注の不足|date=2022-12}}
{{神社
|名称= 事代主神社
|画像= [[File:Kotoshironushi Shrine, Awa City.jpg|250px]]<br />拝殿
|所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|阿波市|Q791587}}{{jalink|市場町伊月|Q55523753}}字宮ノ本100-1
|位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神= {{jalink|事代主命}}
|社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|旧郷社}}
|創建= 不詳
|本殿= 
|別名= 
|例祭= {{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}}
|神事= 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=事代主神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''事代主神社'''（ことしろぬしじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|阿波市|Q791587}}{{jalink|市場町伊月|Q55523753}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。通称は「おっべっさん」。境内は'''伊月農村公園'''として整備されている。

== 歴史 ==
創建年は不詳。一説によると{{jalink|安寧天皇|Q313345}}の伯父にあたる{{jalink|多臣}}の子孫が{{jalink|出雲族|Q22123990}}を率いて当地の{{jalink|阿波国|Q907457}}伊月にたどり着き、祖神である{{jalink|事代主命}}と祖母の{{jalink|五十鈴依媛命|Q10881557}}を奉斎したと伝わる。

{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は事代明神、事代大明神と称していた。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|事代主命}}

== 境内社 ==
* 鎮守神社
* 森壱岐神
* 大住大明神

== 交通 ==
* {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|土成インターチェンジ|Q10927770}}」より車で約15分。

== 参考文献 ==
* 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）

== 脚注 ==
{{Reflist}}

{{shinto-stub}}
[[category:徳島県の神社]]

==End Japanese==
[[Category:阿波市の歴史]]
[[Category:阿波市の建築物]]
[[Category:阿波国の式内社]]
[[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]]
